titleStmt.title: SII 38.214: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 214. (A.R. No. 214 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarāja III Year Dhanu, ba. 11, sōdi, Wednesday, = 1219 A.D. December 4.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that Silambaṇindān Mādhavarāyaṉ Kūttāḍuvan Sēdiyarāyaṉ of Paramēśvarimaṅgalam alias Chōḷakulatilaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Sembūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, made a gift of seventeen buffaloes, and one lampstand of three flats to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. Two shepherds of Tribhuvanasundarap-perunteru received the buffaloes and agreed to measure out ninety nāḻi of oil by the temple measure for burning the perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu dhanunāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattup putankiḻamaiyuñ cotiyum Ekādaciyumāṉa vaṉṟu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu cempūrkkoṭṭattup parameśvarimaṅkalamāṉa coḻakulatilakac caturvetimaṅkalattup para
meśvarimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ cilampaṇintān mātavarāyaṉ kūttāṭuvān cetiyarāyaṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉārkku viṭṭa pālerumai Eṭṭu ciṉai Erumai nālu kiṭāri nālu poli pottu Onṟu Āka Erumai patināṟu poli pottu Onṟu munṟu nilait tarā
kkuttu viḷakku Oṉṟu Ivverumaiyum polikiṭāvuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭavomāṉon tiripuvanacuntarapperunteru maṉṟāṭikaḷil kaṇṭan kārāṇai viṭaṅkak(ka) kon makan Uṟavākkiṉān kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku Araiyum
kovintat tiruvanmāveṭuttāṉ kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku Araiyum Āka viḷakku Onṟukkum Immāṭu kaikkoṇṭu koyil celavu nāḻiyāl Aḷakka kaṭava ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum Āḷakkaṭa�Stops here. It may be read aḷakka kaṭavom
Digital edition of SII 38.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
